titleStmt.title: SII 20.112: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 112. (B.K. No. 96 of 1938-39.) SĀṀSI, KUNDGOL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab lying near the house of Gurubassappa Kumbi.

summary.p: This damaged record is dated in the regnal year of the king which is lost. The extant details of the date are Pushya, Amāvāsyā, Monday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti, solar eclipse. During the reign of this king, the eclipse occurred on the said tithi, in A.D. 1144, December 22, which might be the probable date of this record. The weekday was, however, Tuesday.
The inscription contains a second date, the only available details of which are Āshāḍha, Amāvāsyā.

The inscription seems to record a gift of land, house-sites, and shop to god Gavaṟēśvaradēva of the agrahāra of Savasi (also referred to as Tapasi-grāma) by the Four-Hundred Mahājanas who are praised in the beginning. It also records a gift of income from certain taxes by the Five-Hundred Svāmis of Ayyāvoḷe and the One Thousand Taṁbuligas to the same deity, made over to Īśānaśakti-paṇḍita, an āchārya of the Kāḷāmukha sect. The record which contains an eulogy of these svāmis seems to register another gift on the second date. But the details are all lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . gaṇapatayē namaḥ . © ©
jayaṁti lakuḷīśānamukhapaṁkajanirggatā dharādhiparamēśāntatatvasaṁdēśikā giraḥ . sarasvatyāya namaḥ .
namaśśivāya dēvēṁdramakuṭābhyarccitāṁghrayē Aśēṣajagadutpattisthitisaṁhritihētavē . gurubhyō namaḥ . ©
© svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrī prithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama bhaṭṭāraka satyāśraya
kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatu pratāpacakravartti jagadēkamalladēvara vijaya rājyamuttarōttarābhivri
ddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . māḷavamarddanaṁ magadhamāthana nūrjjitagūrjjarāvanīpāḷabha
yajvaraṁ prabaḷapallavarāyalatālavitranunmūḷitasiṁhaḷēsanadharīkritagauḍanapākritāṁdhra nuccāḷitacō
ḷaneṁdu dhare baṇṇisuguṁ jagadēkamallanaṁ . Alarina moneyoḷu parajayalalaneyanākramisi taṁdu nijabhu
jagrihadoḷ salisida ḷateyiṁ kēvaḷame jagadēkamallanadaṭara malla . tatpādahēmatāmarasasēvitabhriṁgana
rātirājabhū nāthamukhadarppaṇaniṣṭaviśiṣṭagōtra saṁpatparivarddhanaṁ nayaniyōgabrihaspati sa
tupradhā vipra(ṁ)caṁḍanesedaṁ vibhu bammaṇadaṁḍanāyaka . Ati sauṁdaryya samagrarūpamene
jaṁbudvīpadoḷu tāne bhāratavarśaṁ vaśāgra(ga)gaṁṇyamadaṟoḷu dharmmādrimā rūḍhasaṁgatigaṁ tōḷvalamappa
beḷvolaviḷāsaśrī ḷa gūrjita samedirdda pūgoḷadavolu tapasigrāmaṁ karaṁ celviniṁ .
Esedire kuṁtaḷāvani kaḷvamahīruhadaṁtirīpsitara sadānadiṁ kamaḷajāsya sarōjadavolu podaḷda
vēdasahaninādadiṁ jaḷaruhakaradaṁtire lakṣmiyiṁ guṇāvasathamenippa peṁpanoḷakoṁḍudu śrī tapasīpuraṁ karaṁ .
bahuvēdārtthapramāṇā titamatiprajñeyoḷu saṁda nīrēruhagarbhbhaṁgaṁ migilā dānadinakhiḷajanaprītigākaḷpadhā
trīruhadiṁda mēlu gaṁbhīrategī jaḷadhiyiṁdaggaḷaṁ saucacāritrahitaudārya pravīṇākhiḷamanugaḷu nālnūrvvarurvvipradhairyyaru .
© Āntenisi negardda nālnūrvvarssamastapraśastiyeṁteṁdoḍe yamaniyama svādhyāya dhyāna dhāraṇa mōnānuṣṭhānaparāyaṇaru rurggyaju
ssāmātharvvavēdapāragaraśēṣavaiśēṣikanayyāyikalōkāyatasāṁkhyabauddhamīmāṁsā dyanēkatarkkaśāstrapariṇatar manvā
dyaṣṭādaśadharmmakuśaḷaragniṣṭōmādi saptasōmasaṁsthāvabhrithāvagāhanapavitrīkrita gātraru sarvvātithyābhyāgata viśē
ṣāṣṭavidvajjanapūjita svadarmmapratipālakaradharmmaparihārarvvicārasampannarśāpā nugrahasamarttharappa śrīmanmahāvaḍḍagrāma Agrahāraṁ
savasiya Aśēṣamahājanaṁ nālnūrvvar viśadayaśassudhā dyōti daśadiśācakramanaśēṣa dhavaḷisuttamire . mattaṁ
Ayinūrvvara nāmāvaḷiyeṁteṁdaḍe samastabhuvanavikhyātapaṁcasatavīrasāsanalabdhānēka guṇagaḷāṁkṛta satya
saucācāracārucāritrānēkaguṇa nūnavīrabaḷaṁjudharmma visuddhaguḍḍadhvajavirā
jamānānūnasāhasavīralakṣmīliṁgitaviśāḷavakṣasthaḷaruṁ bhuvanaparākramōnnataruṁ vāsu dēvakaṁḍaḷīmūḷabhadra
vaṁsōdubhavaru bhagavatī varaprasāda ṣṭādasapaṭṭaṇacausaṣṭiyōgapīṭhasakaḷadigāśra
ya nānādēśābhyaṁtara puṭṭi pri modalāgi brahmaviṣṇumāhēśvaramataṁ nelaṁ hasuṁ
beyāgi yaṣṭalōkapāḷakaru ha ravāge cokkaṇavoḷavasuṁbeyāge khaṭṭāṁgaṁ kōlāge kūra
si varasurigeyāge cakra vāge vastugaḷe vastuvāge cēracōḷapāṁḍyamaḷayamagadhakōśaḷasau
rāṣṭradaṁṣṭrākuruṁdhakā siṁdhu barbbaraṁ pārasa daikapāda laṁbakarnnastrīrājya ghōḷāma
meṁba nānādēśadēśāṁtara gaḷa . kaṁda . bhadrahastijātṛsvaṁgaḷaṁ koṁḍiṁdranīlacaṁdrakāṁ
tamarakataka nīḷavajra nānāvastugaḷaṁ koṁḍēlālavaṁga caṁdanakhacaraka kartturi(kuṁ)
kuṁkuma śugaṁdha lāṁtuṁ suṁkamaṁ cakravartti yalli hariyāraṁ baḍedu
māṇikēsvara caturssamayaṣaḍdarṣanaviśiṣṭa vidagdapaṁḍitamunijanaṁgaḷu
ge nicca dēva rāgi bagedu dharmmārtthakāma bhōgaṁgaḷaṁ sukhadiṁdanubhavisuttirppa mahiṣagārddabhavā
hanaruṁ vibhūśita ṁṭunāḍa padinaṟivaruṁ gavaṟi gātrigarumaṁkakāṟaruṁ bīraruṁ birudaruṁ seṭṭiyaruṁ
seṭṭiguttaruṁ gauḍugaḷuṁ gāvuṁḍu svāmigaḷuṁ bhalluṁkidaṁḍa hastarājñe yāneye bhēriyāge bhēriye maddaḷeyāge beḷugoḍe ne
ḷalāge nelaṁ kaḷanāge yāge samudra nīggādiyāge caṁdrārkkaḷuṁ beṁbalavāge rāhuve toṁgalāge kētuve surigeyāge si
ḍile kōḷāge kuḷiśa moneyāge ṁgaḷe nāge danadaṁ bhaṁḍāriganāge mūvattumūdēvaruṁ nōṭakarā
ge dēvara dibyāyudhaṁgaḷu tamagāyudhavāge kṣameyeṁba bhāḷa kittu śatruveṁba bāgeyadiṟidu kuḷigeluda bhaḷāriya makkaḷu ḍama
ruga paṟeghōsaṇaruṁ śrīmadayyavoḷeya puravarādhīsvararuṁ lōkaikavīraruṁ lōkaikamānyaruṁ kalahaṁsapūrnnaru tammo
ḷoḷḷidaruṁ kādi sōladaruṁ nānānāthasamayōddhāraṇavairigoṁ daḷacaturmmukharuṁ parasamayakirātakuḷadhūma
kētugaḷappa śrīmadayyāvoḷeya Aynārvvasvāmigaḷuṁ gurudēvadvijabhaktaruktacarita rddānapriyadharmmatatpararanyā
yavidūrarāśritajanādhāravinītarddayāpararatyūrjjitarēkavākyaranagharspājanyaratnā kararnnararoḷu tuṁbu
ligarjjasaṁbaḍadarā visvaṁbharābhāgadoḷu . nacidarggeraḍaṁ bageyarddaṁdhakarallarjjaśakke nallarmmahimāḷaṁbarssaṁbu dāna
taraṁbudhi parivritadharege taṁbuligarssāsirvvaru . śrīmatu gavaṟēśvaradēvara sthānada kāḷāmukhācāryyarīśānaśa
ktipaṁḍitadēvara mahānubhāvameṁteṁdaḍe . jitakusāstrānāṁ saṁgaṁ dhritamahima� ghaughādrivajrāyudhāṁkaṁ va
timānyarddharmmaśāstraprakaraniḷayanīśāṁghripadmadvayārādhitahastanyastabhāvaṁ manu mānnasadriśaṁ nikkuvaṁ satyaśaucabratadī
kṣādhiṣṭhitasaṁyamananupamanīśānyaśaktibratīṁdra . paḷiyallada kīrttiyanujvaḷeyaṁ jaḷanidhiya deseya kaḍegaḷoḷira
ḷvaravaṭṭa tapaśrīgeṁteḷasida śaktimēkanō jagadoḷ . mōnānuṣṭhāna japadhyānasvādhvāyadhāraṇaṁ yamani
yamā guṇaṁgaḷana nīśānaśakti tiyoḷe . © śrīmaccāḷukyapratāpa jagadēkamallacakravartti
rada pauṣyadamāvāsye sōmavāra vyatī[pāta Uttarā]yaṇa saṁkramaṇa sūryya
grahaṇa Asēṣa nālnārvvaruṁ gavaṟēśvaradēva manegaḷuma Ūroḍegēriya
śrīsiddēsvaradēvara gaḍiya pattire teṁkaṇade seṭṭi nivēdyakke biṭṭa kuḷāgraśuddhiya Āṁgaḍi Oṁdu neladeṟe
yamaṁ mānyavāgi biṭṭaru jattagēriya mogeya kamaṭavāḷabaṭṭeyirddeseya padināṟu mattaruṁ kaḍe kamma keyyumaṁ biṭṭaru Ayi
nūrvvaruvā dēvara naivēdyādyaṁgabhōgakkaṁ khaṁḍasphuṭitajīrṇnōddhārakaṁ Allirppa tapōdhanarāhāradānakaṁ Īśānaśaktipaṁ
ḍitadēvara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi puguva poṟamaḍuva bhaṁḍagaḷige poṁgoṁdu vīsamaṁ biṭṭaru mattavalliya taḷa
ṭṭiyaru dēvara caitrakkokkalaloṁdu pāgamuvaṁ . pavitrakkoṁdu pāgamumaṁ koṭṭaru Ikkida basuṁbege pasigaḍava
. taṁbuligasāsirvvaru hēṟiṁge nūṟeleyumaṁ poṟegayvatteleyumaṁ salisuvaru . mattaṁ taḷasama
Āśāḍadamavāse pātadaṁdu dēvaraṁgabhōgakke davaṇāya poguva poṟamaḍuva sīre paṁca The slab
Digital edition of SII 20.112 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
